reviews.review_text:
Where to start!
The smell is unbearable due to the abattoir not far from the caravan park. You either have to stay in your caravan or go out for the whole day,! When you return get out of your car, hold your nose and run back to your van.
The park looks like a construction site, everything is in containers.
It’s mostly long term residence, tarps draped over their caravans, and very untidy.
It’s very close to the busy Bruce Highway so if it’s a quiet time your after keep driving!
My cow , is my awesome place in mackay , CLEAN , PROFESSIONAL , KIND , just a nice place to stay....
Tom was wonderful on the phone! When we arrived we were tired and he held the space with no payment for the second night without payment until we could decide what we wanted to do.

Firstly, the smell. A mix of cat food and death combined. We were not aware at booking that this site was next to an abattoir and that smell was next level.
We were given a site on a corner and at 7am a gardener pulled up to access the contained directly behind our site ( as seen int he picture).Two blokes then sat with the doors open having a very loud conversation two meters from our tent despite multiple free sites on the other side of the road.
The toilets gave prison vibes. There were some nicer showers in a trailer but I only managed to use one once as they were always full as there is only one amenities block for a lot of people.
Would not recommend

Nos asignaron un lugar al lado de baños químicos, el olor muy desagradable! Por otro lado, hay gente viviendo en el lugar de manera permanente, desordenada y sucia; Permiten animales y sus dueños los dejan hacer sus necesidades en cualquier zona. La cocina estaba llena de platos sucios en todas las bachas, mesas sucias y contenedores de basura repletos.

I am a female backpacker traveling alone, and after being turned away by five campsites at 6:06 p.m. because they close at 6 p.m., I finally talked to Tom from Mycow caravan Park, who generously gave me access to the campsite!
I was guided by phone to my spot and was able to enjoy the clean, functional amenities and kitchen and the Wifi. It's incredible!

A huge thank you for letting me stay the night. What a great campground!
Great place,we stayed here for a few weeks in our caravan while travelling Australia, park is beautiful and tidy, great customer service, Thank you so much

For a safe and friendly short/long term  accommodation option in Mackay, the Mycow Accommodation park does tick a number of boxes. Being a 5 minute drive to a major shopping hub and 10 minutes to the Mackay CBD, the park is conveniently position; however, it proximity to the Bruce Highway does lead to highway noise which does become more bearable the longer you stay.

Reception and grounds staff are helpful and hospitable, amenities are adequate and tidiness of facilities is quite good.

Sure, you can pay for jumping castles and swimming pools at bigger parks if you have kids, but for the solo or paired traveler, this accommodation options is more than sufficient for a nightly or weekly stay in the Mackay region. I’d definitely stay here again.

Had an okay stay, the guy in reception was very approachable. The spaces were a fair size and the place was dog friendly which were all positive. There is noise from the highway which I understand not much can be done about. Some of the permanents were a bit rough so I did find myself locking things up I normally wouldn't (just felt compelled not saying they're necessarily those kind of people). The kitchen was a bit ferral the odour was so off putting. Overall I would still say it's okay.
Good for the price. However charging $480 p/w for a couple in a tent is a way too much. It's literally a rippoff.

We stayed for just over a week due to work commitments, really not a bad park but it can get pretty Ferrel especially in the toilets and camp kitchen, I really feel for the people working there because there is not much respect for the place from a few of the people staying there, just dirty dog's.
We left early once my partner found a lump of poo on the ladies toilet floor, we left then next morning.
Staff are great, lady on reception was especially great nothing was to much trouble.
Nice place to stay to explore the Mackay area
Endroit extrêmement bruyant, pris en tenaille entre plusieurs routes. Amenities vétustes et pas très propres.
Next to highway very noises with trucks & cars all night

I've been staying at Mycow accommodation for 3 Months this  a wonderful place. The grounds , facilities are immaculate,The owners Brent  and Marina go out of their way to accommodate to please.They have a team of wonderful cleaners, grounds people that do a wonderful job. Marina is very efficient professional lady.I would definitely recommend Mycow. Lisa Byers.id like to add to my review,as I have read some bad ones.you may come and stay for a week or two and a circumstance might upset you, short stay. All walks of life come and go. These owners take on a lot of spirits and accommodate,no judgement,and aim to help,try going to any caravan park and receiving that kind of respect. Just doesn't happen. It's the owners Marina and Brent that make it happen.And the French and backpackers are wonderful people,just trying to make it ,like you and me.

Les sanitaires et la cuisine sont sales, le camping est bruyant à cause de la route et des cris de d bagarres tard dans la nuit ! Endroit à éviter à tout prix ! Le pied rapport qualité/prix de toute la côte est ! Et en plus on n'arrive pas à déposer un avis sur le site... Comme par hasard

Stopped for couple  of nights, park have backpackers but they  are at work all day so it’s quiet. Friendly staff, clean toilets.
Gardens around the  park  look good,
Nice grassed sites and huge Drive thru( bus easy fitted in)
Would definitely stat on my way back.
Décevant, sanitaire plus que sale. Pas d’eau chaude depuis 2 jours… à ce prix autant aller en free camp

Der Platz ist leider nicht sehr gepflegt, sowohl die Toiletten und Duschen sehen ziemlich schmutzig aus wie auch der Park als solches. Sieht eher wie eine Baustelle aus. Dazu starker Lärm von der nahen Autobahn. Am schlimmsten aber sind die vielen freilaufenden Hunde, die überall hinkacken! Allein auf unseren Platz ums Womo haben wir am Morgen 5 Haufen gefunden, kein Besitzer hebt das auf, lassen einfach den Hund raus und der geht alleine Gassi! Geht gar nicht auf einem Camping, dafür würde ich sogar nur 1 Stern geben. Das Personal ist wie überall freundlich, sitzt aber nur im Office und schaut nicht was draussen läuft! Schade, war bis jetzt in 2 Monaten der schlimmste Camping-Platz von allen in Ozland!

Beautiful cabin. A lot of workers stay here, unfortunately, the backpackers are very loud. They’re mostly getting drunk on weekends and drive around the area too fast, they use the kitchen facilities and are obscenely loud until early hours of the morning.
Too noisy. Too close to a main highway.

Dreadful. Waste of money. Do the extra two hour drive north to spend your money wisely not waste it. Noise from adjacent Bruce Highway all through the night.  Airlie Beach is value for money especially Tazman Park. We spent the same money in both locations and def wasted the money in Mycow.

It took me by surprise the condition of the camp grounds the place is littered with porterloos that look like they haven't been cleaned since they got there the cluster of showers and loo are not central at all so long dark walk in the middle of the night and they were not real clean either to few facilities for the amount of guests to be honest the laundry was ok but you can't add extra time to your dryer unless you pay for a full cycle again to just a money grab . The camb grounds themselves although straight off the highway was noisy but you do expect that but it was just a mish mash of weird to be honest

Possibly the most noisy caravan park in Australia with the Bruce Highway only meters away. Grassed and gravel sites. Awful aroma drifting through the camp site. Nice fenced dog exercise area. $40 for water & power to reverse into. Drive through with power & water more expensive. ⭐️⭐️
Excellent facilities. Friendly staff. Lots of upgrades happening. Highly recommended

We stayed in a powered drive thru site at Mycow Mackay. While the site was okay-easyish to get in and out of, the smell from the abattoir across the road was so awful and also if you are a light sleeper - it is not far off the main road of Bruce Highway. Overall we did not enjoy staying there because of the smell of the abattoir cooking bones and offal etc.

Stayed in numerous parks whilst travelling the last 28 months but never experienced such a dirty park. Shower drains and floor covered in hair, toilets had excrement on the floor. No sign of management to discuss and not what you expect for $48 powered site which was adjacent to Bruce Highway noise!
Es buen lugar pero esta muy lejos de todo y el precio es apenas 3 dolares menos que otros caravan parks mejor ubicados.
I recommended Hilltop to a middle age couple as they were looking for somewhere quiet.

Asked me to leave after 2 weeks of being here bc I had friends coming to see me, over exaggeration on everything that happens in the park, don't get me wrong I understand that its unsettling but you need to grow up ur gonna have people come an go if you don't like people being here just say not aloud visitors instead of making out that that its life or death situation witch it isnt.don't recommended only for the faint hearted
Best place in mackay to stay by far!! Perfect price and great owners!! 100% recommend 👌
Llegué al lugar y fue imposible encontrar a alguien que atienda. Me acerque a la "officina" toque el timbre y nada. Tuve que irme. El lugar está completamente abandonado, no pierdan el tiempo.

Stayed a Hilltop Caravan Park twice now, and founded both owner Brad and Althea amazing to deal with. We had mechanical issues with our van and Brad went above and beyond with helping us repair it. Thank you guys and we will be back very soon.

Stayed for 6 months and the owners have slowly lost all pride for the park and its 5 tenants that are old, special needs, retired or near homeless. Was even told by the owner that the plan is to demolish the place and build a house in the near future so They take cash only and don't provide reciepts or go through the rta, so they will keep your money and your bond. Be very wary of this place. The amenities are un-serviceable and in a filthy run down condition yet they charge $250 a week and don't allow outside toilets and showers let alone use the grass. Other tenants have rubbish scattered everywhere but it's just classic double standards. If Brad decides he doesn't like you anymore he will threaten you and after you report the owners to the authorities for running a dodgy park they will call the police and lie to make the tenants look bad. I've seen people come and go and Brad has had numerous people knocking on his door for a bond refund but because there is no paper trail he ignores them and shuts the door. Brad has also abused tenants in front of other people about personal things and it is very uncalled for and inappropriate. His wife Althea will also yell out profanities towards you when you try and leave. We had to call the police for protection as I was threatened after asking Althea for a probable cause to justify the 5 days notice wich became 12 hours with no remedy to breach warning nor a verbal warning, brad is usually confused as they provide no reciepts and they lose track and take it out on you personally, he can become quite aggressive as he doesn't communicate with Althea properly.

It's the worst caravan park me and my partner have ever stayed at and we are tired of Brad controlling us like it's a hostel for ex convicts.

Be very wary, I'm under oath and if you choose to believe the lies than look further at previous reviews and be very cautious. Please do your research and understand human rights. You can't justify the state of living conditions these
permanent tenants have to suffer with.
Older type park very clean and quiet with great views. Booked in for two nights end up staying for seven,great value will be back again.

A nice place to stay if you're looking for accommodation in Mackay
I'm a French backpacker and MyCow has accompanied me on my adventures for several months. The camp is full of greenery and possums that can be seen in the evening ! The staff are approachable and friendly, and the lady at the reception is always happy to give advice on what to do in the area. I particularly appreciated the importance she gives to everyone's comfort, not hesitating to take dismissal action when others don't respect the good living rules (and as I can see, using racism as an excuse for being kicked out 😂)
Also the 2 kitchens are well equipped, which is good when you don't have camping stuffs
Sometimes the smell of the slaughterhouse nearby can be disturbing, but it's far from being something dramatic that would prevent you from enjoying your rest
Anyway, I'd recommend this place and would definitely go back 👍🏻

Campsite to be avoided, I think I've been kind by putting 1 star, if I could I would have put 0!
we were very badly received, the sanitary facilities are not clean, horrible smells from the slaughterhouse non-stop.
The campsite is expensive, but you can't sleep well and people drink alcohol until very late!
There's another campsite 500m away with a swimming pool and the same price for much more comfort (where the welcome is great)!

We came as a couple and were surprised that after 1 month of renting, the owner kicked us out without any reason.||We are a very respectful and pleasant couple.||As soon as we went to the campsite to see our friends, we were chased away by the police.||We've had nothing but great experiences since we arrived in Australia, and we've never had any problems.||We cry racism!||What's more, the locals aren't clean - we had to wash everyone's dishes several times!||Go somewhere else!

We came as a couple and were surprised that after 1 month of renting, the owner kicked us out without any reason.
We are a very respectful and pleasant couple.
As soon as we went to the campsite to see our friends, we were chased away by the police.
We've had nothing but great experiences since we arrived in Australia, and we've never had any problems.
We cry racism!
What's more, the locals aren't clean - we had to wash everyone's dishes several times!
Go somewhere else!

The administration were some of the most polite and friendly people I have spoken to! Very personable and welcoming. Even when we had to cancel due to unforeseen circumstances they were still really kind.
Next time I go to Mackay that will be where I am staying.
Facilities are good. Clean toilets and showers. Lots of seasonal workers so the kitchen can get quite busy around dinner time. Campsite was okay, but got very boggy with some heavy rain.
Actual rip off 420/week for a shoe box of a room with no bathroom/shower 12mins south alligator creek 211/week shower and bathroom and decent sized room

Amazing place with pristine clean amenities. Both kitchen and showers are top quality. They hosted us in the last moment when we arrived at almost 8pm due to an accident on A1. It’s lovely. Stay here!

Excellent service and a reasonable price for sites.
More of a backpackers stay now

Loved everything about it, was only staying 2 nights but ended up staying 3, the fishing was great , there was tents rented weekly also dongas, caretaker was lovely and I saw a review about the back packers being nosy but we didn't find that, it's was great hearing young ones having some fun , had an enclosed dog area and a great laundry , the highway is right next to park but honestly didn't hear it once in van , but if u want to have a kick back and a fish I recommend here, we will definitely stay again if going through , just doesn't feel like all the rest of the cps that are the norm these days, seemed so much more relaxed
Bit noisy from the bruce

Very pleasant and accommodating when we booked our stay and even extended our riverside caravan spot for 2 weeks. The traffic didn't bother us nor the abattoir smells once we worked out what it was. What did bother us were the young French workers or backpackers who took up the area on the river in front of our caravan, not theirs, and turned their music on and up so we had absolutely no choice in what we had to listen to. I realise it was not always late at night, but it was almost constant. The traffic was far easier to ignore. Added to that was the constant intermittent overly LOUD and obnoxious shrieks and raucous laughter and obvious partying going late into some evenings. The bottles and garbage left behind was disgusting and thoughtless. Garbage was put into recycling where signs clearly said bottles and cans only. The beautiful scenery and tropical breezes and modern amenities would have been lovely to enjoy if we did not feel surrounded by immature and inconsiderate "guests". It felt like we were next to a wild sorority house. Would we recommend this place? 🤔 only if you are deaf or under 25. If Mycow wants more repeat customers, it would be nice if they could command a better attitude from all guests to consider those around them and to entertain mutual respect so that all guests could have an enjoyable time.

Great scenic location by the river for 1 night.....if you'd like to be abused ny drunks and drug addicts. IF YOU ARE FEMALE AVOID THIS PLACE,  the facilities are filthy dirty.  The river is  beautiful.

I’m torn and I usually don’t write reviews. The wide contrast of older reviews had me really on the fence about dropping by, so I’ll leave my experience—

First off, I really appreciated the customer service. I was driving through Mackay around 4pm on a rainy Sunday and their reception was closed. Went onto Hipcamp to pay for a spot, and the lovely girl I spoke to - checked me in and guided me into an unpowered site over the phone.

I didn’t mind the highway, tuned that out easily. The bathroom facilities were much nicer and more spacious than many I’ve seen in FNQ.

Guess I got lucky that the meat processing plant was closed on the days I was there- Sunday and bank holiday. The stench didn’t hit until the morning I left, couldn’t drive out fast enough.

As for the “workers” that the reviews refer to, they do take up the kitchen area. Generally not phased, as I’ve seen worse at hostels in Aus.. sadly, at least 30 or more of the current backpackers are French. They’re notoriously the least friendliest. I’ve had plenty of exchanges with French colleagues, friends and picked up decent colloquial French - doesn’t matter when they’re bunched together in couples/cliques in Aus & can’t be bothered to speak in English.. as they had set out to practice when they went abroad 🙃

About 4 acknowledged my existence, and 1 chatted with me while cooking. Apparently most of them are working at the abattoir and I, again lucked out that even more of the Frenchies had left for the weekend/holiday. I was advised that the kitchen would be more of a madhouse when they trickled back in. So thankful for that heads up!

The deal breaker for me is that the mozzies here are crazy aggressive. I was bitten 15 times over 2 nights. I used a citronella candle, 2 brands of DEET repellent, 1 lemon eucalyptus repellent and wore multiple layers of clothing on top bottom - leggings, linen pants, jumper, socks, etc.

The mozzies still found a way. The first night I kept waking up from being bitten. Was super drowsy for a 5am overseas call I had scheduled. Confirmed it was mozzies, because one tried to hang along the roof of my Pajero during day time, I crushed it and the blood stained my interior.

The last time I encountered the same intensity of being bitten THROUGH my clothes was in the jungle of Ubud, Bali. And these bites are itchy as hell, antihistamine + neither asian or Aussie creams are helping. Which is why I’m now venting my frustration through a review 😩

Overall I don’t recommend unless you are in a pinch for 1-2 nights as I was. If you don’t mind being 20 minutes out of Mackay, I recommend Jarravale Farm Stay on HipCamp! Cheaper price, way less negatives.

Pulled into here for a night on our travels as a friend was staying here and wished to catch up. Staff are friendly and amenities are clean and plentiful. Quiet and respectful guests. The only thing that might upset someone is traffic noise but didn't bother us.  Prices are a fair and convenient location.
The highway is loud but not too annoying. We really struggled with the smell from the abattoir across the road, though probably wouldn't stay again.

Friendly accommodating team of people. Site undergoing lots of upgrades. Beautiful area to sit and enjoy the river. Lots of workers who obviously live at  the park, but for a Friday night it was very quiet and they were very respectful and polite. Mossies were about but and aren't  they always, plugged in the zapper and and they left us alone. Noisy from the highway and train line, but we had a great nights sleep
Close to everything. Would highly recommend
Very, very noisy,  highway oneside,  train tracks the other,  but lovely, cheerful hosts.
Highly recommended for anyone Travelling with Pets.   Friendly staff, when I rang the Man was so helpful.  Easy access and close to Town.

Sehr einfacher Platz neben dem Highway. Reztion am Wochenende nur sehr eingeschränkt, aber sofort nach erreichen Anruf mit Kontaktdaten wenn etwas sein sollte. Für mehr Sterne muss sich hier noch einiges tun. Der Anfang ist Richtung Ufer bereits gemacht da sieht es gut aus. Weiter so
Far too close to Bruce Highway, couldn't even speak to husband without yelling. Sleeping was impossible! Left after one night. It wasn't kept very well...felt like backpackers quality. No photos🤮

Intended only staying one night but extended our stay to 5 nights.|Staff could not have been more helpful and rate was very good.|The facilities and grounds are obviously being upgraded and Malina and Tom are doing a fantastic job of improving the park.|The area by the riverbank was well thought out with seating and fishing holders on artificial grass.  A great area for relaxing and enjoying a cider!|While we were there it was quite wet but the site drained quickly and was a problem.|We travelled with our dog Klim and he was made feel very welcome.|We highly recommend a stay at My Cow at Bakers Creek and we look forward to visiting whenever we pass through MacKay again.||Any negative comments in reviews should be ignored and definitely stay here.

This park is currently upgrading & will be great when finished.
A walking track behind vans overlooks the river with tables & chairs. Very nice. The traffic noise is terrible. It felt like we were sitting on it. (not the parks fault) as the hway is adjacent.
There is not enough clothes lines for this amount of people. With rain & the park quite full with workers, the two lines were full the whole time. Gave up. Marina at reception was lovely, helpful & couldn't do enough for us. She's worth her weight in gold.

Fantastic service. Booked for 1 night, ended up staying 3. Close to the highway, but once in your van you hardly notice it. Great showers and terrific camp kitchen. Laundry has a couch to sit in comfort if you wish to wait for it. Definitely would stay again.
We did a one night stay. The amenities are amazing, large. It's close to a busy road, otherwise we enjoyed our night.

We konden super laat met de camper aankomen. De manager was vriendelijk en het was goed te betalen. De faciliteiten zagen er wat verouderd uit. Snachts viel de stroom uit (blijkbaar eerst sinds 5 jaar) maar de manager heeft ons volledig gerefund en ik mocht de camper laten staan toen we de volgende dag gingen hiken. Zeer vriendelijk en begripvol dus.
Please, go anywhere else. We did, and happily lost our money to not be here.

We didn’t even make it inside the park it is terrible I would say a lot of permanents use it we were checking in when a lovely young man who was checking out after setting up camp and then realised it was not as good as described and asking for a refund of 5 days told us not to go in that he had seen people shooting up in the common areas and the place was filthy I would strongly recommend to go a little further and we managed to get a lovely spot for the same cost at Andergrove van park couldn’t be more helpful

Well, the shower cubicles are large.||That’s about it.||The water pressure was REALLY poor.||However, really, what do you want?||Could not trust the pool for a swim, did not look like it had been cleaned for a while.||Having said that, it is functional. That’s all you really need on a road trip so, yeah, I’d come back but I’d like to hope the water pressure was adjusted!

The caravan sites are very small. The amenities are old and need attention. The door to the male amenities was shocking! The paint was peeling and the surfaces were very dirty... doesn't look as it has ever been cleaned.|The word " premier" should be dropped from the name.
Dirty amenities very run down. Lots of through traffic late at night.  Would not recommend and will not stay on our return trip
The permanent residents are great and very friendly. Be sure to lock up though as undesirables walk through, CCTV doesn't work where needed especially when reporting stolen items to the police.

If I see one bad review against mostly good I often wonder if it's the reviewer, so I'll start from the introduction angle. Our sin was to call and book for our caravan to be towed in by RACQ while our broken down car went 1.9km up the road for urgent repair. I booked one night at first in the hope we'd have the car back the next morning some time as that's what I'd been advised initially. At 9:30am I asked if a late checkout would be ok (the park was half empty) because I was on my way to chase up the car. By 11am Nash was ringing me asking for more money! He kept this up until I paid the 2nd night (which admitted I'd have done an hour or 2 sooner had I not been so upset by his constant badgering and lack of consideration for our situation), then when we went stressed and hot to the park pool (30 degree day) we found a sign saying closed until further notice! $45/nt for a rude, uncaring, greedy manager, a pool you cant use and 50 year old amenities (although clean and mostly functional) is highly overpriced. The next morning at 10:05am he knocked on our door again wanting to know when we would be leaving! At that time fortunately, one of us had already left to collect the car, but I can guarantee neither we nor any of our friends that knew the stress he put us through will ever give this man any business again.

Our sin was to call and book for our caravan to be towed in by RACQ while our broken down car went 1.9km up the road for urgent repair. The next morning at 10:05am he knocked on our door again wanting to know when we would be leaving! At that time fortunately, one of us had already left to collect the car, but I can guarantee neither we nor any of our friends that knew the stress he put us through will ever give this man any business again.

Absolute Dive, owner doesn’t give you any information on where to park just says quote “find a vacant spot” roll in and clearly no where suitable to park, then owner has the audacity to give me lip on the phone while trying to come up with a solution.
Never come across a worst business owner in my travels unfortunately, huge shame.
Save yourself the hassle and stay clear! :)

A very quiet place handy to major shops and food outlets. The park is very old but reasonably tidy.
Has power, water and a RV Dump point.
A great place to stay
Sweet little spot hidden away. Tidy villas and neat van spaces
We stayed in tent .very nice right near beach. Very clean.

Amazing stay at Black Speech Caravan Park. The location is one of the best on the East Coast, with clean amenities and spacious sites. The owners are fantastic….. so welcoming and friendly. Loved the happy atmosphere with kids laughing and families enjoying themselves. Would definitely stay again
Excellent experience

Love Black's Beach! A true gem.
We stayed in our camper trailer. Clean toilets and bathrooms. Nice pool, nice water play area. Clean BBQs. Its a small park so we did find there was limited fridge space, but that was manageable. You really can't beat being right on the beach!!!! Just check out the photos!!!

We had such a relaxing stay at BIG4 Mackay Blacks Beach Holiday Park. The location right by the beach is beautiful and the whole park is very clean and well maintained. Our family loved it. Such a calm, easy atmosphere that made it really enjoyable.

The staff were wonderful and kindly allowed us a later checkout, which we really appreciated and made the end of our stay much less rushed.

We’d happily stay here again and highly recommend it to families visiting Mackay!

I had such a lovely stay here. The location is honestly amazing, right in front of the beach with beautiful ocean views. Waking up and seeing the sea every day never gets old.

What really makes this place special though are the managers. You can tell they genuinely care about the park and believe in what they’re building. They work so hard to keep everything clean and running smoothly, and they’re always friendly and up for a chat. It makes a big difference when the people managing a place actually put their heart into it.

The pool is a great bonus, especially on hot days, and overall the park feels very well looked after.

It’s just a really nice, relaxed place to stay. You feel welcome straight away. I’d definitely come back and would recommend it to anyone passing through.
Clean amenities and camp kitchen, nice staff and great location
Sehr ordentlich und sauber. Schön am Strand gelegen. Viele Fledermäuse in den Bäumen 🦇🦇🦇.
Fabulous location, but maintenance is not a high priority at all!

Beautiful spot right on the beach
Clean and well kept
Ample facilities and lovely pool
Great location and a well run, clean and tidy caravan park.  Staff are friendly and experienced.  A beautiful vista from the beach end overlooking nearby islands.
Cabins were clean beds comfy grt location right near the beach
Very small and tidy. On the beach and well shaded.

We had a cabin, and the rest of the family were in their camper. We got put nicely close together. Beautiful location right on the beach. Would be 5 stars if it wasnt for the stench of rotting fish from the bins. Many of the campers were fishing, and you cant blame the site if some campers spoil it

Stayed on a powered site, both going north, and on our return.
Good park and amenities.
Nice park
Had a great time there, great location, clean amenities and kitchen, and Andrew is lovely ! We had a great time chatting with him. Will definitely come back!

We cannot recommend this Park highly enough.
The staff in reception were lovely and informative of local tourist attractions.

If you are a Gday parks member you get a nice discount. Fees are good for what the Park offers. Park is on the outskirts but still close to shopping centres.

The food van at parked at the entrance early evening was a nice touch, saved cooking 😀.

It was surprisingly quiet considering we were beside the pool and near the camp kitchen.
The campers were extremely considerate.

The permanent residents were very site proud which kept in the clean and well maintained Park presentation. Lovely people to interact with.

Amenities were spotlessly clean and the camp kitchen well equipped.
Well done guys 👍⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Great pool, clean amenities, wonderful staff, just a little noisy
Great park. Large flat grassy area for unpowered. Even my dog was happy with enclosed off lead area. She gives this park 10 out of 10

I had a powered ensuite site for the duration of my work needs in Mackay.
The Mackay Caravan Park is a wonderful place to stay.
Ok.

Tidy. Green. Well maintained. Pity that 2 & more dogs are allowed on one site or 5 are allowed between 2 sites.
Pity that owners do not know how to control their dogs barking especially at 420am.
Lovely park that is very well maintained,  sparking pool, clean amenities and a leash free area for dogs. Coffee van open every morning 6-9am.
Huge van park. It has a perminant section and a traveller section. Amenities are clean and modern, power and water available. Reasonable prices and concessions for extended stays.

We booked for 3 Days but we extended 3 times that’s how lovely this park is . From the time we made our booking to checking in with Tanya who is lovely & an asset to this Park ! To much to list about this park because that’s how lovely the whole park is ! I can’t wait to go back again !
Cheers Conie
El camping más hermoso en el que he estado. Atención excelente. Todo precioso

Can't recommend them enough, my wife and I have been to over 200 parks in our travels and this is up there with one of the best overall.
Clean, quite, friendly staff, big area for dogs, good price, great pool that was immaculate even in the heavy rain somehow and just overall a great park.
Very little shade to be had here. Paid for 2 days, left after one night. Just too 🥵
Clean and tidy.  Hot was very accommodating and friendly.  This is our second stay, we're happy with it.

Lovely site with lots of space on each site. Pool was lovely and there was a great Camo kitchen with a spacious seating area. Receptionist was lovely too. Perfect location if you're visiting the lagoon, as it's only 10 mins away!
Centrally located in Mackay. Good amenities and well kept. Good dog friendly with fenced exercise area to walk dogs.

Stayed here while travelling for work. I was grateful to have been able to book alternating week for over 9 months. Very tidy, great customer service. Just remember some people are on holidays and will be noisy at times. Just be patient. Would stay here again if transiting in future.
Grass sites , sandy , clean amenities , be careful with large vans .

This was one of the best caravan park we stay in. Plenty of green grass, few shady area, The entrance was just lovely to drive into. And at night it was just the same, lights lid up. It have a lovely pool. We booked in on 2-3 Dec 2025.. Because we booked for two nights it drop from $65 to $45 with your very own ensuite. They even provided body wash, shampoo and conditioner. I saw cleaner cleaning park benches and swimming pool was tested 3 times a day. If I come back to Mackay in future, I’ll definitely stay here again. Thank you so much

Cannot speak highly enough of the owners and the park facilities. They squeezed us in last minute and saved us from having to stay at Central Tourist Park (do not stay there). The owners were so nice they helped us out by decreasing the charge for the night after learning that we were not refunded for the park previously named. The location is outstanding and you are immediately greeted with a lovely atmosphere. Amenities and pool absolutely perfect 👌 thank you so much ☺️

Right on the beach in a quiet residential area. Very good fishing off the beach (when they're on the bite), good sized sites, very good sealed roadways. Good water pressure, TV signal, mobile reception. Amenities adequate & clean until they're not, great rain shower heads. Welcoming reception. Only gripe is occasional cohorts with kids who race around the roadways in the evening on bikes, scooters etc in very poor light - parents don't care - one day an oldie will be seriously injured. Park needs to enforce barring of this activity at night. Highly recommended.
Amazing location so beautiful
Great location, we were fortunate enough to have a beach front site. Would return if we're in that area in the future
Lovely spot on the beach.  Great shower & bathroom facilities with pool & large camp kitchen.  Will visit again.
Brilliant location right on beach- great views- close to shops- nice beaches to walk on- pool ok and facilities ok- would definitely stay again
Great park but wouldn’t get a cabin again as very pricey but definitely a park to stay at if in Mackay.

Great location. Room very expensive. Light hanging out of ceiling. Told desk about it. Quite rude, lady said "yeh we know about it" or words to that effect. Sliding door kept getting the stuck closed, very hard to open.

We had a lovey 6 days and nights at Blacks Beach. Our site was lovely and flat, a drive through site, we even had a glimpse of the ocean from our van door. The staff at check in were lovely and very helpful. The ground staff were also very pleasant and helpful. We only had a very short walk to the most beautiful clean beach. The amenities were extremely clean. We didn’t use the lovely BBQ area or the pool but they looked clean. The park generally was very quiet even though most nights it appeared full.
It’s our second visit to this park and once again we were not disappointed .Excellent check in clean amenities and well maintained areas our only disappointment was we thought we were there longer 😂
Great little gem of a park. Straight onto beach.
Wifi non existent, no key to lock front screen door to allow fresh air, front door curtains see through no privacy   Overall disappointing
Lovely quiet park on the beach..Shopping centre about 4kms ..Quite a long way from Mackay cbd..
Great caravan park with excellent clean amenities. Beach very close and easy walking along flat beach. Highly recommend.

Beautiful spot on a lovely beach.
The only thing that annoyed us is that they packed in the caravans in the drive-through bays.
Always a great spot to spend time walking on the beach, fishing and just relaxing. Magic location
Nice, clean and well maintained.

Excellent experience!
Very clean campsite and super friendly staff.
Functional washing machine and dryer.
The location with the private bathroom was great.
I 100% recommend it if you're visiting Mackay.

Last time we stayed in Mackay we stayed in another Caravan park which was very ordinary|Wow with Park what a surprise very well maintained grounds are excellent has a great camp kitchen good sized covered pool very clean & tidy pet friendly.|Staff very helpful |I highly recommend this park

A nice park with lots of space
Sites have plenty of space
The amenities are modern and well maintained
A good camp kitchen is available and there was a food truck on the weekend
Space for giant rigs too, there’s a semi trailer caravan with a car and a boat under the awning
There is an annoying Pacific Koel bird that starts calling at 3am where we had our caravan but overall it’s a great place
Nice toilets and showers, quite far away from central and doesn't justify the price, kitchen area no fridges, no pans basically just the bbq spot that's it, takes ages to cook anything.
Very happy customer Very nice and clean

What a delightful caravan park! Management and staff were so helpful! The park is spacious and gardens immaculate and the camp kitchen is one of the best we've seen! It was a pleasure staying there! John and Julie
Clean and well cared for. Need CC for w/machines

Awesome service from staff very accomadating fits my work truck no worries, they actually spend money on the park upgrading Rooms and amenities and my villa was beyond expectation, I've stayed at a couple places in Mackay while working away and this one takes the cake. Great work guys 👏

Office staff very welcoming and friendly.
Park was clean and tidy in all ways.

This might seem crazy but I loved the text message I received prior to arriving letting us know that our caravan site was ready (40 mins earlier than check in), never received a message like that before so you already had me won over before I walked into reception.

We will be back for sure, and longer next time.
A bit over priced . Unpowered sit $45 night

A great spot with super welcoming and helpful hosts. The sites are a good size—even for big rigs—and the facilities were really clean and well maintained. Loved the food vans and live music, such a nice touch! The park is also really central to the city and shops, which made everything so convenient. Would definitely stay again!
We stayed on the unpowered area, there’s plenty of space, there is some undulating areas. It would be great if there was water available.

The park is very clean, the amenities are cleaned daily and are extremely clean, staff are friendly and polite. Only a few minutes drive to the Harbour or the City Centre.|This is our 2nd stay and will be our forever stay when we visit Mackay...

Apres 1 mois passer au camping j’ai trouvé le personnel de l’accueil très gentil, espace commun sympas. Par contre le monsieur et une femme du housekeeping très désagréable, ne dis pas bonjour, regarde mal, excuser moi de dire sa mais à la limite du racisme.
Had a very pleasant stay. Great spot. Lovely gardens. Very nice receptionist. Love the coffee van!!!!
Great value for money, helpful staff new owners

Good Park.
Amenities as they should be.

Couple of suggestions
Some bins closer to the front sites
A way for the front site to walk through to the amenities. If there is a way through then marking it clearly would help.

Large and spacious park, I saw a huge truck park there for days as well so they can comfortably accommodate larger rigs.  Amenities were very clean. The laundry I was closest to only had 2 machines,  and they take credit cards.  The staff in the booking office were lovely and helpful.  Wifi was none existent, you had to be near the camp kitchen.

My wife and I have stayed here a few times during 2024, with the longest term being 30 days. The staff are always kind and the grounds are kept immaculate. We enjoy the size of the sites and the clean amenities. The camp kitchen is very well serviced and always clean every morning. We love the pool in the summertime.||The location is central to all of Mackay's services, such as shopping centres, ALDI, fast food stores, the wakeboard park, and beaches. Road noise is not an issue here.||At the time of writing this review, we paid $45/night for a powered site for 2 adults.|I would recommend this park and will stay here again soon.

Great park, clean and well looked after. Very quiet but close to everything. Lovely pool and camp kitchen. Large sites available
The staff were friendly and helpful/ informative

Absolutely manicured gardens with runway type lighting on the main entrance to the park. Quiet and safe. Great location to shopping centres 4 in total only metres away from ski park other sports clubs and goose ponds.
Excellent place to stay huge areas for your van lots of grass too just beautiful would recommend staying here .

Accomodation was great and the staff are lovely people. I enjoyed my stay for the week apart from some other residents/visitors that made it quite unsettling. Had an older lady outside the bedroom window peering at me through the closed blinds, she took off into the residents area with an elderly man when I went outside. Also had someone trying to get in for several minutes at 1am. It didn't feel very safe and is poorly lit at night.

This was our first visit to Andergrove C/Van Park and we were very impressed with the immaculate grounds, spotless amenities, extremely friendly and helpful staff . We will be highly recommending it to all of our travelling friends and we’ll certainly come again next time we are in Mackay👏👏👏
A great place to stay. Friendly staff, good clean accomodation.
Good grass site close to the camp kitchen, Lady in the office very helpful when we wanted to extend our stay. During peak season changed a couple around and got our extension.

We have stayed at this park 4 times this year and would highly recommend to stay here if you are visiting Mackay.||Lush green lawns.|Wide roads.|Good size camp sites.|Large, clean and functional camp kitchen.|Resort size swimming pool with shade.|Safe and friendly camp site. ||The office staff are amazing and friendly.|Extra bonus is the new Aldi Store is less than 5 mins away. Woolworths and Coles are a short drive away too.||Jan and Phil
Io e il mio ragazzo abbiamo soggiornato qui per una notte in van in un powered site per 42$ in totale. Bagni e cucina pulitissimi e signora all'accoglienza super gentile.

Absolute great place to stay.  Good pricing close to shops, McDonald's, chemist, bottle shop and some really nice long-term and short-term guests. Tom and Linda the managers they are a lovely couple. I'd highly recommend stopping in and saying hello

Great service very friendly would stay again amenities clean but could use an upgrade in the future 😉
Well this is our 3rd stay now second time in a cabin and of course we would stay again  👍🏻.

What can I say, there is very old caravan homeless in tents there shit is everywhere around them, a couple was having sex in the ladies bathroom, would not recommend this place to anyone. Not worth the $45 per night.
Great place to stay, shady, clean and tidy, staff are friendly.

Great park with good facilities.
Clean and tidy.
Girls on reception desk were very friendly and helpful.
Went there for concert....staff great room great, pool great...went tiki touring while there...will be going back..
We dropped in last minute for a powered site , lady in reception was lovely and helpful, dated amenities but clean. Great price we enjoyed our stay thank you.

This park advertised "pet friendly " It is far from pet friendly!!! After we paid for 9nights, we were told, " We are NOT actually pet friendly and you must stay within the very confined perimeters of the " unfriendly pet area"  we were jammed into this limited space with near to no room to park our ute, as we were towing a caravan, this made things very awkward indeed.  Other people outside of the pet area were very rude and bossy towards us with pets as well. |Overall would definitely not recommend "The Park Mackay"to other travellers with beloved pets!!. |Also, The area near the pool was disgusting too, with many permanent residents having junk and very untidy areas around their sites. It was gross!!! Overall a Very disappointing stay indeed.
No rooms, stayed in our caravan
Paget Boilermakers can be aggressive on the hammers 🔨 at night 🌙 😳. Other than that very convenient.

Clean amenities  and easy drive through site. Great for $40 per night.

Second stay with these guys .So accommodating withe drive through and pet friendly site.  Staff absolutely 💯.

Loved our stay at The Park. Office staff are helpful and friendly. Amenities are cleaned daily by cheerful ladies who quite often sung a tune while they worked (made me smile) & grounds are well taken care of. Thankyou to all for an extremely pleasant stay 😊

Great park. Good size sites.
Great camp kitchen
Needs amenities updating
Only 4 toilets and 4 showers
More washing machines in laundry
One machine is not enough
Will definitely stay again

What a beautiful park! Where do I begin? Lush, green grass, meticulously clean ablutions, crystal clear pool, the absolute BEST camp kitchen (much better than a camp kitchen tbh) and a lovely sitting area. Andergrove Van Park is beautifully maintained and the owners are super friendly and helpful. It is quite simply the best park we have stayed in since we commenced our travelling. Thank you Adam and your wonderful team.

We booked into this place and was put in the worst part of the park bloody terrible. Nothing like what it shows on the photo’s on their website. I went back to reception and the lady was accomodating and moved us near the pool.
Nothing is a problem!

We had a great site (#14) which was bear the kitchen, pool and amenities.  Pretty quiet and green.
Would come back.

Estaba solo y sin vehículo y me cobraron AU$38 de todos modos para poner mi tienda. Los baños son buenos, el lugar es limpio y pacífico, el personal servicial pero la ubicacion es mala y el precio me pareció excesivo.
Sites where good, neat enough park, laundry was an avco hut, nice pool area, pretty good place

We had a caravan site it was great. We had power and water and only cost $45 for Big 4 members.
Samara was very helpful and friendly.
We are booked again for next year. PS it's pet friendly so our Sophie had a wonderful time.
Vicki, Ken and Sophie 😍 😎🐶🐾
cheap place to stay in a unpowered site , have hot water , the toilet are very good also the amenities , was 39 per night and the staff was friendly , little bit far from the amenities.
Good clean roomy park in a good location.

A lovely roomy caravan park beautiful lawns, grass areas and slab sites and good paths and roads.
Dog friendly. Swimming pool.
An absolutely gem of a Caravan Park, the grounds were immaculate and the amenities were spotless.We totally  enjoyed our time there

Extremely well kept and maintained Caravan Park in Mackay. Grass beautifully mowed and very green. Amenities excellent. Thanks so much to Adam, Reception staff for finding us a very nice space near pool and camp kitchen at late notice when camping ground was almost fully booked. Highly recommend
Had a great short stay, our cabin was magnificent, was a treat to stay there, location so close to the beach, great experience.
Stayed 5 nights in our caravan, site was superb, managed to get a beachfront site. Staff very helpful. Amenities were clean and well maintained.

Nice caravan park right adjacent to the beach with access steps.  Could do with another amenities block as there is only one.  Decent pool with shade sails and splash park for the kids. Camp kitchen was well kitted out including tv.  Lots of birds throughout the park, possums at night and a goanna that l saw a few times sunning himself outside the amenities area.  Wifi was not great not sure where you need to be to get any good access to it. Pet free park so no barking  dogs.
Best night sleep, loved my morning beach walk, great family cabin tysm 😊
Excellent service and nice staff 👍

Our stay at Blacks Beach Caravan Park was really good. Not only does this park have a great layout it is also very well maintained. After finding out we were staying on our site the maintenance man made sure he blew the dust off the concrete pad so it was nice. The ladies in the office made sure we had the site of our choice and that worked out really well. The amenities block is well looked after and cleaned regularly, and that shows. The pool is a ripper and the splash pool for kids is a big hit also. Finally and the best, I asked if my sons family (wife and two sons 11 and 9 years old) could come over to visit, of course they said aslong as they are well behaved.
And the pool
Nice quiet holiday park with great shower and toilet facilities and it's right on the beach for an amazing sunset/ sunrise views.
Beautiful clean facilities, with the beach right next to park. The managers are so lovely. We forgot our towels and lent us one. Would go back anyday.

Amazing place and also amazing host. Two Italian friends and me (Peruvian) stayed at the caravan park for one night. The location was just next to the beach and the facilities were amazing.
The host an Australian fellow was very kind and friendly. I highly recommend this place

It was a busy period over Easter with lots of families around, but the best part was the location right on the beach, which made it easier to go for walks. Friendly owners and other guests were very helpful.  Stayed here before in the cabins. Showers and toilets pretty clean.
The location and park was lovely. It was a shame that the service was so disappointing.
To recommend... When good weather.

Top camping, met geweldige receptie/managers!

Groetjes 🇳🇱
Jillian on reception would have to be the most unfriendly rude person I’ve come across in a caravan park. I will not be returning.

Kleine maar fijne camping direct aan het strand met een super uitzicht. Faciliteiten zijn verouderd maar zijn redelijk schoon en werken allemaal goed. Wij raden deze plek aan voor minstens 2 nachten op doorreis.
Je kan er goed vissen vanaf het strand.

Siamo arrivati alle 6 di domenica e la reception era chiusa ma i titolari sono stati gentilissimi ad aspettarci. Il camping è molto bello e tenuto bene ma sopratutto è davanti alla spiaggia ! Bellissimo per vedere l’alba. E poi il titolare è stato super gentile lasciandoci tantissimi consigli per il road trip ! Altamente consigliato !

I had used the online portal to request a booking for me and a dog. The website has an option where you put yes/no for a dog. I got an email back with options for powered or unpowered. When I arrived and mentioned I had a dog they said I had no dog attached to my booking and their dog sites were unavailable for the dates I was there for. The woman in reception was professional. I've been put out massively trying to scramble for accommodation last minute elsewhere with a dog. Either the staff missed my online booking request with a dog or the website is buggy. Ideally you could book straight through the website so it's all locked in.

Location set aside for dog owners. Amenities clean and a decent camp kitchen. Washing facilities include a card reader for ease of access.

Called to ask availability and pricing and no one answered, was later called back by someone who seemed like they didn’t want to be there, we decided not to stay because of their apathetic nature and like we were inconveniencing her.

Wonderful staff at The Park! The cost of powered sites are very reasonable.  The amenities are dated but kept clean. The Park is very close to an industrial park and noise can be bothersome. Earplugs recommended if you're a light sleeper.
Very good park. Amenities are always spotlessly clean. Staff are friendly and helpful. Love staying here
Great van park and for our doggo.

Lovely Park, friendly staff, very clean amenities. Only issue was 1 of the permanent residents behind our van was very rude, swore at us and very drunk. Clearly thought he owned the Park. Highly recommend otherwise.
Good campervan site, reasonable cost and great location near main highway. Advise booking ahead.
Right on the highway, great for a one night stop, has a pool and drive through grassy sites.
Good location away from the hustle and bustle of the city centre.  No kids.  The airport is close by but planes didn't keep us awake.

What a gem.. Beautifully  kept park. Nice drive through sites. The amenities  are old but are kept in pristine  condition  a big thank  you to cleaning staff you do a fantastic  job  well done.

Staff were very pleasant, grounds beautifully kept, facilities very clean and modern, central to everything we needed, park itself very quiet, a bit of road noise but not bad

This is our home. We live in the over 55s permanent section. Living is easy and relatively cheap. Some neighbours are a pain, but this is to be expected given the closeness of a van park. We downsized in semiretirement and are happy.

Nice park, plenty of customers, mainly workers so very full.  We ended up with a very small site.  Park well set out good clean amenities.  Close to Mt Pleasant shopping centre.  Lots of trees, lawns nicely mowed.  Staff friendly and helpful.  Would stay here again and hope for a bigger site.

Nice park, cost $50 per night, amenities clean. Nice camp kitchen, if others would clean up after themselves. We did have one of the permanent residents hanging around the kitchen area 2 nights in a row, and checking out the kitchen when no one was around. Don't leave anything laying around. Lovely staff. Would go back.
The Units there are very good, daughter lives in one of them with her son, possibly a little bit on the experience side but what isn't in Mackay.

After nearly 6 years here at the Van Park Andergrove  I have met a lot of residents. There is a social group  I enjoy a couple of drinks with and a few  " stories  " makes he time fly. The rent is workable and for me a Pensioner its great. . Neil
Great place and friendly staff!

We lived in this van park for over 12mths in our van. Cannot say it was an enjoyable time. There are a few permanents that think they own their site & surrounding areas. The owner of the park is rude & very unprofessional. Last year we had at least 7 wks with the pool being green so we couldn’t swim. There is no hot water in the camp kitchen. This van park is not child friendly as the only thing they have is the pool nothing else for them to do. Riding bikes is not allowed when the owner arrives. They do not cater for tents. The ammenities consists of 4 toilets & 4 showers which in peak times for the size of the park is not enough hence they sometimes are left dirty. I do not rate this park family friendly.

I wouldn’t stay anywhere else. Staff were lovely, villas were clean and tidy, bed was comfy and park was clean and tidy. Would recommend to everyone just an enjoyable stay. Mackay is great and the park made every effort to accommodate me.
Excellent service, very friendly and amenities are super clean, we were very impressed and would not hesitate in staying again ... extremely impressed with it all
Great location and staff.
Great place to stay and close to town. Staff are great and very helpful. Stayed here for years and will keep doing so on our grey nomad adventures every year
Nice park with a good atmosphere, reasonably pricey but good amenities.

Advertised as an over 55's village yet provide little extra amenities that age bracket would require... roads are in heavy disrepair, and safe walkways are non-existent to basic amenities such as pool.

Just a quick last minute campsite needed And wow what a gem $40 a night powered site with tap behind the large site for campers and vanners. Has cabins for workers. A pool laundry showers had great pressure and plenty of room in there to. Plenty of shade A dump point and a rubbish area.
Neat and tidy park , friendly and helpful  staff, close to shops.

The Park

Basic caravan park 10 minutes from Mackay.  The van site we were given was difficult to get into and on an angle with tree and van in front.  At least we gave the locals a bit of fun for 5 minutes.  If choosing The Park, be aware that you cannot drive out to the right and into town.  There is an island in the middle of the road so you need to go left and alter your route to get into town.  The amenities are clean and they have a pool, but it's a fair walk from the caravan sites.  I did like the BBQ's which were basic and easy to clean.  At $40 a night, 3 stars is fair for The Park.

One of the cleanest campsite bathrooms I’ve ever seen!
The facilities are a bit older, but they are absolutely spotless and very well maintained. You can really tell that cleanliness is a top priority here. Everything was regularly cleaned, fully stocked, and in great working condition. It made our stay very comfortable. Highly recommended!

We stayed at the powered site with our motorhome for one night. Very clean and spacious including the toilets, kitchen, campsite. The noise is minimal too. No mosquitoes. One of the best campsites we ever stayed at. Highly recommended
Clean tidy amazing staff such a friendly place

Very nice and friendly. Enjoy staying here.
Cheers Marion

Hubby is staying long-term in our own van. Managers and staff are awesome, friendly, and approachable. It shows that they enjoy their job and take alot of pride in their work.

Amenities are kept very clean. Laundry amenities are well priced and have everything that you need. Pool is very clean and relaxing.

Close enough to town but far enough away to avoid the hectic traffic.

I have stayed 3 times. Now booked for May 2025.Great price, staff friendly & helpful.. Quiet. Clean. A/C. M/wave. Fridge etc. Highly reccomend. Great value for money. ....................................................................
Super Campingplatz! Uns hat es sehr gefallen 👍🏼 die Einrichtung war sehr sauber und gepflegt. Empfehlenswert😊 sehr nette Dame am Empfang.

The Park Mackay is clean & comfortable with excellent facilities. We used both a powered site and cabins during a construction project and Linda was excellent at facilitating our crew during their stay. Highly recommend!
Never stayed just enquired at the front desk with Deb who was helpful and the park looks amazing.

Generous van sites, very clean and tidy.
Huge camp kitchen with plenty of seating and lounges. Would definitely stay there again.

We went with our camper van and we got an unpowered site. Our place was quiet and peaceful. The facilities are so clean. We had access to washing machine and dryer. The area around the bbqs is clean and great to relax after a long journey.
Moreover, the receptionist was so kind and helpful. We recommend this place to have a good rest.
Highly recommend! Great attention, lovely staff at the office! Super friendly. Nice and clean facilities!

The park and staff where amazing BUT... the Lady owner that was up from down south was discusting.. the way she treated her guests and residents was terrible. We where living in the park while getting our house built in Mackay and had the most pleasant stay for months. The staff and grounds where great and amenities spotless. Then the owner turns up and turned it upside down. Everyone on edge she was yelling at children and instead of helping and making people feel welcome it scared people away. She is well known around mackay for all the wrong reasons in business but we won't go there.. We left without a refund for the week paid and won't be back. Never met a person like her. Upsetting as it was such a lovely place to call home..
Spacious quiet and friendly

We stayed in this camping with out van for one night only. The place is clean and tidy and the reception welcoming and friendly. The only cons are:
- the unpowered sites are destined in a large grassy area that becomes mud with the rain (we risked to get bogged just after a night of light rain)
- wifi is only working in the camp kitchen area and around (too far away from the unpowered sites)
- there's no stove and no dishwash soap in the camp kitchen (just 3 BBQs).
Anyways, other than that, we enjoyed our stay.
Very happy with this park. Staff were excellent. Sites large and level. Easy access. Thanks guys. If we return to Mackay, we will be back.
The people at the office are so lovely! Great tidy van park!

Great little cabin for 2 senior ladies spending a couple days in town. Just need to ensure things are working properly at all times. Cabin needs a full length mirror inside and ensuite needs a curtain or glass to protect everything from overspray from shower otherwise a good stay.

This park has it all from over night spots to permanent to semi permanent and the staff are really friendly. They have dive through sites, dogs and cats welcome. The staff are awesome and ready to help
out. They also have gas refills, ice and basic things to buy there. Only 5min drive to Oorelea shops and only a 10min drive to CBD

Nice and very good place to stay..staffs very accommodating

We came to stay after a long day, we arrived around 7pm. We ran a washing machine in the laundry room and when we came to pick it up the laundry room was locked. Clean park facilities, easy caravan parking, but if you are travelling with a dog not the best place. Although they will let you in, the dogs are not allowed to be walked around in the park, leaving you the option of a very busy road or the Bruce Hwy. Not pet friendly.

stayed here for 2 nights, the kitchen and bbq area were well stocked and clean, amenities were clean and comfortable.
And the park was well maintained.
Had a cabin overnight clean and good value . We will stay here again.
Paid a bit extra for the drive through site and it was perfect.

Fantastic staff that are very accommodating. Great amenities that are very clean. Very clean pool even tho we didnt go for a swim. Easy parking especially with a large van.  Close to supermarkets. Will stay again on our way down south from up north.

I had stayed at The Park for quite a few months, in a tent then a caravan while working.
I have nothing but praise for the management and staff. Very welcoming and friendly. Camp kitchen, toilets and other facilities were clean and tidy.
Highly recommend staying there. I will definitely be booking again when passing through.
Thankyou to all the staff.
Lovely caravan park,  tropical and friendly.
it's fully booked out for long term  but there other sites for tourists

Great caravan park. Del was very friendly and helpful for our arrival and tourist information. A bit of noise from the Bruce Hway but to be expected. Plenty of helpful businesses located in the area for those various needs when travelling.

Stayed here camping with the fam in January 2025. Such a beautiful spot so we extended our stay longer than planned. Kids had a ball in the pool, friendly service and clean amenities we will visit again one day.

Good park close to the beach. The amenities were clean but not the best we’ve seen. The radio in the amenities was nice, though! Beach is good for fishing but not swimming. Ice creams at the reception were overpriced. We had a great view of the red moon from our site.
Love this caravan park, not too large, great amenities and fabulous location right by Black's Beach
Such a great place right on the beach, great for the kids to run around and just be kids , good pool area.  BBQs and outdoor kitchens
Nice to visit a friendly environment.
Nice place to visit and stay in a relaxing environment.

Disappointing Stay with Unfriendly Staff

We stayed at this caravan park for a few days, and while the grounds were nice, our experience was ruined by several issues with the staff.
When we first arrived, we were placed near a neighbor who watered their garden over the fence, soaking our entire tent.

The real problem started in the shared kitchen. As we carefully stored our food in a bag with our name on it. One morning, we found our bag outside the fridge after the staff had finished “cleaning.” The food was warm, and we had to throw it all away, which was quite costly for us. When we asked the staff why it was removed, they claimed not to know. We asked if they could check the cameras, as we were certain it was someone from the staff, but the lady in the office was dismissive, claiming the cameras didn’t work and insisting the staff wouldn’t do such a thing.

To make matters worse, the same neighbor watered their garden again, soaking our tent. We went to the office to ask for help, and the same rude lady was there. She was already annoyed when we approached, and when we explained the situation, she told us it wasn’t her problem and that she couldn’t speak to the neighbor because she couldn’t leave the office. There were three other staff members present, but none of them offered to help or show any concern.

Overall, the lack of customer service and the rude attitude of the staff really soured our experience. We’ve stayed at caravan parks for the past 4 months and never encountered such unfriendly staff. Very disappointing.

Stayed for 3 weeks had an issue when we left told me I'd only paid for 6 and not 7 days when I specifically said another week. No apology or anything it was like pay up not very people friendly the owners. On the upside the pool was nice. Little pricey for powered sites and tje prices double in the holidays

A lovely man at the reception. He was really welcoming and friendly. We felt more like friends than customers.
The kitchens are clean and you have everything you need. The toilets are also good and clean. You have direct access to the beach from the campground and the view is spectacular. It's wonderful to watch the sunset and relax a bit.
Very nice showers and toilets,  good location
Snuck in to use the pool, had a wonderful time. Kids really enjoyed it, plenty to do and good location. Can't comment on rooms or service as I wasn't making use of them...
Very hard to get your caravan into the space, all reverse in and very tight. Location is very nice.
Thank you for the park and service. I love it !
Wonderful stay, just loved it, we will be back.

Lovely park right on the beach. Fishing & swimming at the beach as well as a great pool. Lovely clean amenities.
Located a couple of minutes drive from shops, 20mins to centre of Mackay.
Great park close to town, excellent amenities and friendly staff.

We has a beach front site and the views from the back of the van were outstanding. This is one of our favourite caravan parks that we return to each year. We just open our back doors and we're amazed at the views.
Andrew and Fiona make you most welcome. Photo from our van. WOW
Clean but dated. About ten mins to town depending where you’re going. Closer super markets if needed. Excellent internet and phone reception. Would stay again.
Nice roomy cabins, clean and fresh it has everything you need for the week. The pool was super cold and refreshing.  Definitely would recommend it. See you again soon.

No unpwered sites and $38 is too much for a single retired pensioner.
Nice clean facilities,  helpful and friendly staff
Great little cabin full accessories. Quite should have stayed longer
Terrific place to stay when traveling...very helpful staff.
Went to buy product on marketplace didn't stay at the park.
Very clean and tidy a great place to stay.
Very nice staff and very helpful staff members

Very well kept park, easy to manoeuvre around with the caravan, all amenities are spotlessly clean, friendly and helpful staff. Very relaxing and quiet, price was extremely cheap and would stay again.
Great and cheap place to stay in Mackay - short walk to the local shops. I absolutely loved they have a tap and pay washing machine & dryer! Wish more places had this!

Excellent park. We stopped there on our way north and then when we returned south (we travel with an SUV). Amenities old but always clean. Everything pretty quiet. The kitchen is well equipped. We first booked a powered site and it was small but okay. The second time we booked unpowered and the area was really extensive. Great 4G signal with Telstra and Optus (we use it to work online). The receptionist was very kind.
Only stayed in our caravan, found the park accessible, quite and very reasonable
Close to Mackay shops and tourist attractions.
Good private little park owners very friendly amenities clean pricing is ok very happy to stay there will definitely be staying again
This place has always looked after us for after hours check in. They give you map with highlighted truck parking and room location for you. Rooms are always clean, I would stay here again!

Nice busy park with heaps of overnight transients.
Amenities clean but not a lot of showers and toilets for such a big park.
Sites a good size.
Staff friendly.
Clean and nice staff at the counter.

This was the third stay for my wife and I at BIG4 Mackay Blacks Beach Holiday Park.  We have returned to this park because it is a very pleasant caravan park.  It is small, and the sites are compact but it is in a good location.  This stay we managed to get a beachfront site. Great spot right on the beack. Quiet and relaxing.
On the beach.  Hotel close. Place is looking tired. Every thing was clean and tidy, staff very helpful and friendly.

Amazing location so close to beach! Kids enjoyed fishing, ping pong and pool!
The tavern was great for dinner also.

What a fabulous 2 days at this lovely park!
Ocean view site with an amazing sunrise.
Amenities are super clean and the staff very friendly and helpful.
Definitely worth a stay.

One of the best parks I have ever stayed. Loved waking up to the sunrise over the water each day. Great sites, not too many but not a small park. Amenities were fantastic. Location was also easy to get to.
Amazing setting, lovely clean amenities and friendly service.

Nice caravan park with all the normal amenities.

Nice smaller splash park and great pool. Park backs onto a great beach to wander up and down.

Located in a quiet part of town a short 15 or 20 minute drive back into Mackay.

We had a great site down towards the back of the park, however I would have been disappointed if we booked one of the drive through sites, as they are stacked in, no way of opening an awning, or perhaps even a window!

Biggest negative for us, the groundskeeper team move wheelie bins around the park between 7am and 7:30am every morning, but hay, if they are up and about, i guess everyone should be!

"A Gem with Amazing Beach Access", checkout the beach access and park photos. A great park with 8 sites backing onto the beach and direct beach access, good BBQ and great Pool and a small water play park for kids.
Toilet blocks were very clean and tidy pro ably less than 5 years old.
Nice park on the beach
It was one of the nicest camps I have stayed in.
Schöner Standort direkt am Strand. Wir waren 2 Nächte dort und hatten bestes Strandwetter. Amenities sind voll in Ordnung.

Great campsite, friendly staff.
Very nice spots, very good amenities.
Close to the beach as you can get.
Nice place
Loved this place as a stopover on our camper van holiday
Awesome place, friendly people
This is a great family park . Great staff, super clean and well maintained.  Highly recommend.

Black beach big 4 is a lovely park we stayed there last night in our van in a drive through park. The staff were lovely with a small awesome water play area for the little kids and a lovely o for the bigger kids. Amenities were clean and well kept. And meters from our van we could could straihht into the beach. We def be back when travelling through

Great location right on the beach! Plenty of showers and toilets for size of park. Amenities could be better maintained. If using laundry, need to mind your clothes and any bags left there while wash on as one of ours was taken (you can get that anywhere I suppose but this is just what happened to us here).
Great CP, Friendly helpful staff. Nice facilities. Clean amenaties
Very clean park directly on the beach. Good friendly service. Amazing pool. This is a smaller caravan park which is nice.

This is a smaller Park. In as much as there are fewer site, however the sites are spacious and they come with a slab or a green mat. The amenities are kept clean. We occupied site B6, being beach front. This is to the right of the front and it's the end one so more room at the awning side and uninterrupted views of the Beach ⛱️, this spot, if you can get it is the best! The park rates are reasonable for the location. It is situated about 10kms north of Makay. There is a shopping complex about 3kms away where you will find Woolworths and coles amongs other retailers. We spent two weeks here and could have stayed longer. The beach walks are awesome.
We had two cabins and it was comfy,nice to listen to the ocean at night,lots of sites.We did enjoy our stay there
Camped in rooftop tent here for 2 nights. Very well maintained and clean. Modern showers and toilets. Pool was a bonus. Great sunrise and walks on pristine beach. Would recommend staying here. 👍

Sept ,Unfortunately blew a gale this time we were there! Very nice and well maintained park. We booked last minute 1.5 week ago, but very promptly and pleasantly provided with a drive through site that we preferred for just the 2 nights we intended to stay. We stayed in this caravan park many, many moons ago and were pleased that it is still a great place to stay. Amenities were clean and tidy, sites were a nice size for such a busy part of the coast. The direct beach access is great and offers beautiful sunrises and opportunity for long walks. Nice park for families too, but the park was really nice and peaceful at night time nevertheless. Nice room for kids and adults to find entertainment or watch TV. We explored the area on our bikes a bit, no hills to navigate so an easy ride.
Eimeo Pub is a very short drive away and can be recommended for its amazing view whilst enjoying a coffee or a meal, the venue itself could do with bit of TLC.
The park's amenities were very clean and well maintained. Highly recommend.

In all our travels we were blown away with this little piece of the world🤩 what a gem 👍 we had booked in for a couple of days and just kept extending our stay😜 to start with the managers and staff are amazing, super friendly and welcoming 🥰 the amenities were spotless and park and beach front will blow you away 👍 I always read other people’s reviews and everyone is entitled to their opinion and looking at nearly every review you will see this place is one of the best however there was one that said something about flying foxes which I would like to inform you all there was none there over our stay 😉 so basically loved the place that much I’m bringing my family back for Christmas 🤶 Thankyou for your hospitality 🥰❤️
Next to a long nice beach. Bath rooms are very clean. There are many large trees in the park, producing a very relax and enjoyable  environment.
Great location and excellent amenities.

Excellent park. We scored a beachfront site for the night and it was actually beachfront! Amenities were clean and tidy, caravan sites were a nice size plenty of room for van and car we didn’t feel squeezed in. Beach is fantastic great sunsets and you just have to get up for the sunrise it was amazing. Nice beach walk and plenty of room for kids to play if you need. Not really near any shops but there was a tavern not too far away. Mackay is fairly spread out so shops and food is only a few minutes drive. This park was great I wish we could of stayed longer. Highly recommend.

Excellent campsite. Welcoming staff. Location is amazing and if you can go for a beach front site it will not disappoint. Pool and water splash area great for kids and me! Camp kitchen facilities were fab. Not too squashed. Would definitely return and wish we had stayed longer.
It’s just a couple of steps to the pristine Black Beach from our powered site.

We kwamen te laat aan op de camping. Receptie was al gesloten. Eigenaar heeft ons super fijn geholpen. De dag erna was alles mogelijkben niets was te gek. Have really enjoyed a very relaxing 5 days at Blacks Beach.  Great sized and well setout park.  Super easy access to the beach.

Great park with good, clean facilities. No visitors allowed and I found this really disappointing, considering we are travelling with a baby it would have been easier for our friend to come to us.
