Lovely lawn surrounding caravan sites and park backs right onto the beautifully wide, sandy beach. Great Mexican food van on site- delicious!

We loved our stay in our caravan at Blacks Beach caravan park. The staff were so friendly , everything was clean and well looked after. Location was great being right on the beach ,small shops within walking distance and larger shops a short drive away. Look forward to staying here again.
Peaceful beach front park, well worth the stay
VeryVery good

My partner Rob and I stayed at this caravan park and our experience here would have been a 10 star rating but as 5 stars is the maximum, we could only give 5.   We had the Glamping Tent book for 4 nights and arrived at the park a little early to check in. This is where we met the manager Andrew and he quickly explained that this wasn't a problem.   He allowed us in through the gate to park our vehicle and apologised for not having the Glamping Tent quite ready.  He said to have a coffee at the coffee van and he'd notify us when we could check in.  Within 5 minutes he came out and told us we could check in.  We both picked up on his friendly and easy going nature.  The Glamping Tent was clean and comfortable and the beach frontage was stunning.  As we were enjoying our stay at this park so much we decided to set up our own tent on a site for a further 4 nights. Andrew drove us around on his buggy showing us the sites available and recommending the best one for us.  As Andrew and Fiona, the park managers, made us feel so at home along with the cleanliness of the amenities we decided to extend our stay another 4 nights.  Due to Rob badly  tearing his calf  muscle we were considering moving in to a cabin.  The manager,  Andrew,  called past to say g'day and after we explained what had happened he put a cabin on hold until we made our decision.  10 minutes later he arrived back with a set of crutches.  Also assisted us in finding a physio.  Andrew also offered to pick Rob up in the buggy and take him to the amenities when needed.  We then  decided to move into a cabin and they immediately had that ready for us.  They also supplied a "State of Origin" night for all guest's to watch the game on the tv in the well equipped camp kitchen plus decorations and free sausage sizzle.   Andrew and Fiona went above and beyond to make us feel welcome (all guests).  After the tearing of the calf muscle injury the support and assistance from both Andrew and Fiona was outstanding.  Do yourself a favor and stay at his caravan park. We cannot recommend it highly enough.  Other guests we spoke to also didn't want to leave.  We will be back!!!

Fantastic park, good tidy amenities, nice pool area, well kept grounds, great staff and great location right on the beach, great views. We were lucky enough to see two dolphins swim by and put on a show. I would definitely stay again.
Great location, beautiful park and great customer service!

Loved this park. Amenities  were very clean and modern. Laundry was fantastic. Great friendly staff and Jac's Coffee and Taco van at the gate all make this a great place to stay. Plenty for kids to do with a beautiful pool, water park, peddle carts etc.
Noisy room.. you can hear everything your  neighbours are doing

Nice quiet place. Good location. Clean rooms.

Only suggestion would be to put a gate between the big pool and kids area for safety reasons.
Good location for visiting Mackay & surrounds
Was comfortable nice amenities

There were crumbs of food on the dining chairs left behind from previous guests.

Park location was pretty by the water overall the park wasnt up to the usual standard we've come to expecr from Discovery.
They are extremely helpful here. The cabin was perfect. We only wish we spent more time there. Thank you!

We stayed here during our road trip with my husband, our two young kids, and our two dogs. The facilities were clean, and the beds were spacious and comfortable. It was even better that the kids could enjoy some water play before check-out.

It was fine for a one-night stay.
One of the toilet blocks was closed.
The toilets were spacious and clean.
The campsite kitchen could do with a bit of a clean, and it needs a proper stove for cooking, as there was only a barbecue. The fridge contained old food covered in mould and gave off a nasty smell. They definitely need to clean it out.

Estuvo bien para pasar una noche.

Los baños eran amplios y limpios.
A la cocina del camping le falta un poco de limpieza, y una cocina para cocinar, ya que solo había bbq. La heladera tenía comida vieja, con hongos, salía olor feo. Deberían limpiarla sin dudas.

The park itself is clean and the staff are friendly, but dealing with upper management has been really disappointing.

We’re a Queensland family relocating to Mackay with two young kids (2 and 9). Both of us are working and our youngest is in daycare, so things are already full on. Since November 2025 we’ve spent thousands staying with Discovery Parks while trying to find and buy a place locally.

All we asked for was a short transitional stay with a clear exit date, and we even offered to sign an agreement to lock that in. The only response we got was that there’s a “new policy” and that “it should have never happened.”

That didn’t really make sense, especially when their own info says extensions can be discussed with reception and approved by management. From what we could see, other longer stays were still happening as well.

Because of this, we’re now having to pack up and move every 40 days, which is honestly tough when you’re juggling work, school, daycare and trying to settle into a new area.

We weren't trying to stay long-term just needed a bit of stability while we sort out a home and get set up properly in the region.
The hardest part isn’t even the “no”, it’s the lack of consistency and support when it feels like there could have been some flexibility.

A bit of understanding here would have made a big difference.
This place has been a haven, beautoful friendly warm staff, lovely grounds clean amenities. Its gorgeous here!
모기는 퀸즈랜드의 심각한 골치 거리다. 그러나 모든 캐러밴 파크가 모기 때문에  문제가 있는건 아니다.  늦은 저녁 도착해서 수도와 전기라인 설치하는 단 5분간 10군데이상 물렸어요. 산책 나갔던 와이프도 급히 들어오고 … 시설은 좋았으나 모기문제 정말 심각함. 다음날 도망치듯 캠핑장 빠져 나왔어요. 추천하지 않아요.

Nous sommes français , Nous avons été mal reçu surtout nous étions en vélo avec une chaleur étouffante , à  l'accueil elle voulait rien savoir même pas  comprendre le français avec le traducteur je ne le conseille pas  , merci aux employés français qui nous ont bien aidée
Great place for families and kids.

this park was very pretty and great for the kids to make friends and walk around. Lovely undercovered outdoor bbq areas. This park isn’t annoying and isn’t always checking when it comes to the rules and is mostly relaxed. The wifi is horrible and the whole time we stayed there the slide was shut and the main pool was hot. The park also did a christmas decorating competition and said there was a prize for the winners and never announced the winners, so people set all there lights up for nothing. during christmas day that had santa drive around and throw presents, that was very fun and involving and staff were so nice.

Wow!! What a disgrace!! This park was the worst one we have ever stayed at!! The reception staff was unbelievably RUDE!! a bunch of absolute cows! Nasty attitudes! We stayed for a week $600 mind you for a powered site. The slide wasn't running half the week, we were speaking to others in the park about the main pool harvesting bacteria and making families sick!! It got closed the 2nd half of the week. This park is only after money!! No costumer support given whatsoever! Happy to take money but if you want to cancel booking they will take that to... even when the park is half empty. I will be warning ⚠️ everyone I can to not waste your time or money here. This park needs to be closed down!

Well my wife and I have done a lot of travelling and stayed in myriad of Hotels/Motels/Caravan Parks so I feel I can make a fair review on the Mackay Discovery Park. We were travelling with our dog and were lucky enough to get a Dog Friendly Cabin. We were offered a second night at reduced rate however declined the offered due to our travel plans.  Well they changed so went back to take up the offer. Well in the 15 minutes it took to work things out the cabin was taken by another traveller.  We were the offered an upgrat still with the same great discount. I will say at this time the original cost was far cheaper than our accommodation of like type we had the previous night.The rooms were very clean, great size bathroom/toilet plenty of cooking equipment, the bed was the best we had ever had in our travels. The assistance provided by the staff was second to none. We will be back.

Really enjoyed our stay  in our caravan here. We had a site beside the wetlands, and loved the birdlife and serenity. Our ensuite was clean and well set out. Not a lot of shade around the park (palm trees don't provide much shade) but grass was green and well kept. We'll stay there again when in Mackay.

Das war mit Abstand der schlechteste Discovery Campingplatz wo wir bis jetzt waren. Zunächst einmal war der große Pool gesperrt weshalb man in dem Kinderpool schwimmen gehen musste. Dies wurde uns jedoch nicht mit geteilt obwohl uns die Örtlichkeit des Pools auf der Karte gezeigt wurde. Nachdem wir zwischen mehreren Kindern im Kinderpool schwimmen waren wollten wir bei der BBQ Area grillen. Wir hatten unseren Salat sowie unser Fleisch in den Gemeinschaftskühlschrank gelegt für ca. 1 Stunde. Als wir gerade anfangen wollten war unser Grillfleisch weg. Nachdem wir eine Nummer des Campingplatzes angerufen haben erklärte uns die Frau dass wir unser Essen hätten beschriften sollen und sie nichts machen kann. Aufjedenfall unser Fehler dass wir unser Zeug nicht beschriftet haben jedoch war der Salat noch da somit konnte keine Verwechslung vorlegen und unser Fleisch wurde definitiv geklaut. Nachdem wir heute Früh erneut bei der Rezeption nach gefragt haben ob es möglich wäre die Kamera auszuwerten wurde uns erneut nicht geholfen und gesagt da kann man nichts machen. Dazu kommt dass unser Strom auf unserer Camp Site nicht funktionierte. Haben dann den Strom von einer anderen Camp Site genutzt.
Rund um hatten wir wirklich keinen angenehmen Aufenthalt und verlassen diesen Campingplatz mit einem genervten Gefühl.

After having had a terrible week and arriving at the park a bit early, it was unbelievable service by Jayde. She organised a back up cabin in case our van was in longer for repair and generally made me feel so much calmer than when I walked in. Really appreciate the amazing service. The site was mowed, clean and plenty of facilities for kids too. Thank you
Places are clean and well maintained! Recommend!

We always love staying at Discovery Parks Mackay! The price is really good and there’s heaps for the kids to do. They even have food vans that pop in sometimes which is a nice touch, saves having to cook every night. Jayde and the team are absolute legends, always go out of their way to make sure our stay is the best it can be. Super friendly, helpful, and just make you feel welcome every time. Can’t recommend it enough.
We stayed in a cabin, which had everything you need, it was well maintained and clean. Very happy with our stay here.

We recently stayed here with our two young children and I'm unsure who enjoyed it more, us or them. Was a fantastic park, in a easy and convenient location. The staff are absolutely amazing and the facilities were so clean and easily accessible. My kids already want to go back! Thank you for making our stay so enjoyable, will definitely be recommending to our friends and family!

We had a fantastic stay at Mackay Discovery Parks! The grounds were spotless, beautifully maintained, and full of lush greenery that made it feel so relaxing. The cabins were clean, comfortable, and well-equipped — everything we needed for an easy, enjoyable getaway.

The kids loved the pool and playground, and the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, always ready with a smile and great local tips. It’s in a perfect location too — close to town, the beach, and plenty of attractions.

Highly recommend for families, couples, or anyone wanting a peaceful, well-run park to unwind in. We’ll definitely be back!

Thanks for our weekend stay at Mackay Discovery!! Clean ammenities, drive through sites for our van and heaps of activities for the kids! The pools were clean and well looked after and the staff friendly and accomodating. We will be stopping in on our way through Mackay anytime.

Stayed with my family and can say our needs were met. A beautiful clean park, very friendly staff and many activities for the kids. Only a short drive to the stunning harbour.
When staying in Mackay we recommend this beautiful park to everyone. Thanks Jayde & team for your amazing hospitality during our stay.

I was invited by a friend to check out this park. I didn’t realise you could pay $10 for a day pass and use all the equipment. The kids loved the waterpark, mini golf and jumping pillow. We are headed back next weekend for some barra fishing. Such a cheap and amazing day out. Although we didn’t see inside the rooms if the rest of the park was anything to go by I’d say they would have been well maintained. I encourage anyone to check it out.
Great price and location

Awesome clean place.
Stayed opposite the jumping castle.
Very clean amenities.
Shower water pressure could be increased, otherwise 10/10.

Definitely coming back
Take your pest spray got absolutely carried away by mosquitoes day and night
Ein schön abgelegener Campingplatz Zimmer habe ich nicht bewertet, da wir mit dem Camper vor Ort waren. Alles ordentlich und sauber am großen See gelegen.

The first tome we stayed the room was dirty. mouldy windows dirty floor. I understand it's a dog cabin but that doesn't excuse the cleanness of the Cabin.
Be aware the road it's right next to the park and trucks all night with the brakes going off as they slow. At least the beds were clean and fresh.
Second stay on the way bk we stayed in a different Cabin much cleaner expect someone else dog hair all over the lounge.

Terrible park to stay in. The park is run down  with the rooms damaged and unclean. We were given the wrong room, told it was an 'upgrade' by staff when, it's clearly a cheaper cabin online then what was booked. The blanket was unwashed and smelt like dog, which was crumpled at the end of unmade bunks. Extremely Disappointing Experience - Would Not Recommend

We stayed at Discovery Parks Mackay for over a week without any issues until Friday night, when a disaster struck. Our tent site flooded due to a burst pipe under our tent, forcing my partner, dog, and I to sleep in our car. Despite calling the emergency number several times, no one responded until much later. We even had to ask neighboring campers to help us move our belongings out of the water.

When someone finally arrived, it was the groundskeeper who turned off the water and then blamed us for the flood, saying we placed our tent peg in the wrong spot—even though there were no warnings or markings. This was highly inappropriate and unprofessional, as it was clearly an issue with the park’s infrastructure.

The next morning, we spoke with the manager, who didn’t offer us any help or compensation. Other campers suggested that a decent response would have been to upgrade us to a cabin for the night, but the park staff showed no care or concern for our situation.

To make matters worse, when we went to the office to discuss the issue and request a refund for the nights we didn’t stay, the receptionist was dismissive and rude. She sighed while we explained our concerns, and despite initially promising to refund us for Sunday, the park later reneged on that commitment.

The level of service we received was unacceptable. Not only were we forced to leave due to an issue caused by the park’s poor infrastructure, but we were also treated poorly when trying to resolve the situation. I would not recommend staying at Discovery Parks Mackay, especially if you expect any kind of support or professionalism from the staff when things go wrong.
